Klasse TypedValue<A>

java.lang.Object
org.quurz.plugins.TypedValue<A>
Typparameter:
A - the compile-time type of the typed value's value
public final class TypedValue<A> extends Object

A typed value wrapper that holds a value together with its explicit runtime type.

This class is particularly useful for reflective invocations where null values must be passed and the type information needs to be preserved at runtime. It can also be used to return values from reflective operations with their runtime type information.

Examples: 

            // Passing null with explicit type information
TypedValue<String> nullString = TypedValue.typedValue(String.class, null);

// Wrapping a value with its type for reflective operations
TypedValue<Integer> result = TypedValue.typedValue(Integer.class, 42);
Class<?> resultType = result.getType();  // Integer.class
Integer value = result.getValue();        // 42

Seit:
1.0.0

  • Methodendetails

    • typedValue

      public static <A> TypedValue<A> typedValue(@NonNull Class<? extends A> type)

      Creates a new TypedValue instance with an explicit type and without a value.

      Useful when only the parameter type needs to be provided for a reflective call and the value will be set later or null must be passed.

      Typparameter:
      A - the generic value type
      Parameter:
      type - the explicit, non-null type of the typedValue
      Gibt zurück:
      a new TypedValue instance with the type set and no value
      Löst aus:
      NullPointerException - if type is null
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • typedValue

      public static <A> TypedValue<A> typedValue(@NonNull Class<? extends A> type, @Nullable A value)

      Creates a new TypedValue instance with an explicit type and an optional value.

      This factory method is the general variant to set both type and value. The type must not be null; the value may be null.

      Typparameter:
      A - the generic value type
      Parameter:
      type - the explicit, non-null type of the typed value
      value - the typed value's value; may be null
      Gibt zurück:
      a new TypedValue instance with value and type
      Löst aus:
      NullPointerException - if type is null
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • extractTypesAndValues

      public static org.quurz.foomp.base.util.Tuple2<Class<?>[], Object[]> extractTypesAndValues(@NonNull TypedValue[] arguments)

      Extracts the types and values from an array of TypedValue objects.

      The result is a Tuple2 where the first element is an array of the types and the second element is an array of the corresponding values.

      This method is suitable for preparing reflective invocations (e.g., constructors or methods). The order of elements is preserved.

      Parameter:
      arguments - a non-null array of TypedValue objects; must not contain null elements
      Gibt zurück:
      a tuple with two arrays: one of the types and one of the values
      Löst aus:
      NullPointerException - if arguments is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if any element of the array is null
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • extractTypesAndValues

      public static org.quurz.foomp.base.util.Tuple2<Class<?>[], Object[]> extractTypesAndValues(@NonNull List<TypedValue> typedValues)

      Extracts types and values from a list of TypedValue objects, preserving order.

      Parameter:
      typedValues - non-null list without null elements
      Gibt zurück:
      tuple of (types[], values[])
      Löst aus:
      NullPointerException - if typedValues is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if any element is null
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • extractTypesAndValues

      public static org.quurz.foomp.base.util.Tuple2<Class<?>[], Object[]> extractTypesAndValues(@NonNull Stream<TypedValue> typedValuesStream)

      Extracts types and values from a stream of TypedValue objects, preserving encounter order. The stream is fully consumed and processed sequentially.

      Parameter:
      typedValuesStream - non-null stream without null elements
      Gibt zurück:
      tuple of (types[], values[])
      Löst aus:
      NullPointerException - if typedValuesStream is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if any element is null
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • getType

      public @NonNull Class<? extends A> getType()

      Returns the explicitly specified type of this typed value.

      Gibt zurück:
      non-null type
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • hasValue

      public boolean hasValue()

      Indicates whether a value is set.

      Gibt zurück:
      true if a value is present; false otherwise
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • hasNoValue

      public boolean hasNoValue()

      Indicates whether no value is set.

      Gibt zurück:
      true if no value is present; false otherwise
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • getValue

      public @Nullable A getValue()

      Returns the value held by this typed value (may be null).

      Gibt zurück:
      the stored value, possibly null
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • getValueSafe

      public org.quurz.foomp.base.util.Maybe<A> getValueSafe()

      Returns the value held by this typed value as a Maybe.

      If no value is set, an empty Maybe is returned.

      Gibt zurück:
      a Maybe containing the value if present, or empty otherwise
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)

      Compares this TypedValue to another object for equality. Two TypedValue instances are equal if both their type and value are equal.

      Setzt außer Kraft:
      equals in Klasse Object
      Parameter:
      o - object to compare with
      Gibt zurück:
      true if the given object is an equal TypedValue; false otherwise
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()

      Returns a hash code for this TypedValue based on its type and value.

      Setzt außer Kraft:
      hashCode in Klasse Object
      Gibt zurück:
      computed hash code
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • toString

      public String toString()

      Returns a string representation in the form TypedValue[type=..., value=...].

      Setzt außer Kraft:
      toString in Klasse Object
      Gibt zurück:
      human-readable description of this TypedValue
      Seit:
      1.0.0
